question: The founder effect is:

options.a: random change in the frequency of alleles due to the establishment of a population by a small number of individuals

options.c: changing the locus of the gene in the chromosome

question: Malformations of the human axial skeleton related with evolution are:

The direction of evolution of the axial skeleton of the vertebrates are: 1) replacement of the chord with cartilaceous and then to a bone skeleton; 2) division of the axial skeleton into subdivisions (from 2 to 5); 3) increasing in the number of vertebrae in the subdivisions; 4) evolution from a fin to a five-toed limb; 5) increasing the mobility of the joints of the limbs with their girdles; 6) formation of the chest.

The direction of evolution of the skull of the vertebrates are: 1) merging of the facial skeleton with cranium; 2) replacement of the cartilaceous skull to bone skull; 3) increasing in the volume of the forebrain; 4) mobile connection of the skull with the spinal column; 5) increasing in the number of bones of the skull; 6) reducing the number of bones of the skull due to their merging.
Malformations of the human skull related with evolution are:

options.e: adentia (absence of teeth), microgenia (underdevelopment of lower jaw), cleft palate
